title: Mexican Sausage and Curry Jammy Pasta
description: A flavorful fusion of Mexican and Italian cuisine, this dish combines the spicy kick of sausage with the sweetness of curry jammy pasta.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Grill the Mexican sausage until it reaches an internal temperature of 160°F.
In a pan, combine the cooked sausage, curry, and diced onions.
Add the jammy sauce and stir to combine.
Combine the cooked pasta and sauce mixture.
Serve hot and garnish with diced onions and a sprinkle of curry powder.
Optional: add some heat with diced jalapenos or red pepper flakes.
